title: PRODUCE48 集中討論區（65） 日日投票

replies.msg:
《PRODUCE 48》是韓國Mnet邀請AKB48家族總製作人秋元康一起合作，並在2018年推出的選拔生存實境節目。

《Produce 48》將從參賽的日本39名、南韓57名女練習生中，最終選出12人。



主持：李昇基
主唱導師：李洪基（FTIsland）、韶宥
舞蹈導師：裴允貞、崔容俊、MAY J LEE
Rap導師：Cheetah

主題曲：
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UOmolLOQ7Rs
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9TR1e25CQUo


韓國官網
http://produce48.mnet.com/pc/main

PRODUCE48 練習生花名表
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1-TlJ7sqBeW2XkXy8rbDYv7Icj9Fj3mYaJc17XB-o5pw/edit



直播
週五香港時間 22:00-00:30
link:
http://global.tving.com/ (官方韓字)
https://tv.idol001.com/video_live.php?action=list (中譯配音)
https://www.facebook.com/ATC48/?hc_ref=ARReEKMxrAEIaJMq7-AE2Ufr28bJhK7msibPtlzQrf0MlYVRRZs7QjdqlraQF7mmoEo (日字轉播)

投票教學 (by食咗藥未啫)
首先要有個韓國認証Gmarket帳號
然後dl韓版Gmarket
ios:https://itunes.apple.com/kr/app/%EC%87%BC%ED%95%91%EC%9D%84-%EB%B0%94%EA%BE%B8%EB%8A%94-%EC%87%BC%ED%95%91-g%EB%A7%88%EC%BC%93/id340330132?mt=8
an:https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ebay.kr.gmarket


下載好個Apps之後當然要登入啦


登入之後去返主頁，search ‘produce 48’，會自動跳到相關頁面

跟住投票，第二次排名發表後只可以投2個
揀好2個就click最下面條粉紅色bar，再按粉紅色制完成投票，完成投票後會送你一張優惠券

replies.msg:
Ito Hirobumi is a historical figure? 48 Japanese participants controversial controversy

Cable Channel Mnet Survival audition program Producer 48, Japanese participant Shitaomi (17) introduced Ito Hirobumi, a Japanese imperialist, as a historical figure of the trend, and promoted a museum that beautifies World War II war criminals "Said the statement. However, there are many rebuttals that the Japanese participants are disturbed by distorted or exaggerated content. The controversy is taking place in the Internet community on the 13th. 'Produce 48' is a project program that introduces Girls Group AKB48 system, which was created by Japanese producer Yasushi Akimoto in the selection system of Producer 101 of the same broadcaster that recorded hits in Korea. Cable broadcasting has attracted a great deal of attention with a high 2.6% rating. That's why there has been a heated debate over the history of Shita in many communities. Ito Hirobumi was in the forefront of the imperialist Japanese aggression war and colonial policy. He forcibly dissolves the armies of the Imperial Empire, forbids the studying of Koreans, and slaughtered Koreans opposed to imperialism. Ahn Jung Geun's doctor condemned Ito in 1909 at Harbin station in China.

Ito is from Yamaguchi Prefecture, Japan. It is the hometown of Shita. At the local government event that introduces Yamaguchi Prefecture in 2016, Shita said, "There are many historical figures in Yamaguchi Prefecture, such as Ito Hirobumi." In 2017, he visited Ito Hirobumi Memorial Park and published it on the SNS as "the birthplace of the first Prime Minister." He also took a photo of the old 1,000-yen bill model, which had been carved on the front of Ito Hirobumi, by taking his face. It has also been argued that Shitao promoted the Yamaguchi Historical Museum, which is exhibiting the goods of Japanese imperialists and leading the history distortion. In a video uploaded on the Internet, Shitaya said, "It is great" to find this site. There is also a scene where Shita hits the hand. In the scene introducing Ito Hirobumi's front panel, the woman's admiration is heard along with the man's admiration of "sugoi" (great). Not only the main audience of 'Produce 48' but also many community members and SNS users questioned Sita's history. Critics of broadcasters and program producers who have failed to test the controversial past have also been outraged. Shita was ranked 41st in 'Produce 48' at the time of the first rankings, but it continued to rise from the 3rd week, and it reached 6th place in the 9th. By the end of August, if you maintain the inside of 12th place, you will make a debut as a group. It is said that an ironic situation may arise where a Japanese who has enamored the invasion of the Korean Peninsula is on the K-pop stage. MNET officials said, "We have confirmed some of the issues raised on the Internet," he said. We are not discussing any future action, "he said.

However, Shita's fans claim to be overconfident. It is the core of the claim that the place where Shitao was photographed is not only a museum but a 'Japanese restaurant' Saikotei. In addition, the video said that the Yamaguchi area broadcasted the Meiji Restoration 150 years ago and looked around the city's major attractions with idols. He claims that it is not Shita who said "great" in the video. The Yamaguchi Prefectural Tourism Federation is introducing this place as "a place where you can find books and collections of celebrities such as Ito Hirobumi." He also explained that he will resume the museum and reception hall in Yamaguchi City in 2004.

​​關於下尾MIU近日爭議事件澄清

原文參考：http://gall.dcinside.com/mgallery/board/view/?id=shitaomiu&no=30843&page=1 /

http://gall.dcinside.com/board/view/?id=shitaomiu&no=30262

標題：MIU有關爭議事實整理

1. SHOWROOM相關爭議

MIU在SR裡透過國藉調查投票說希望日本飯變得更多，然後差別對待韓國飯了嗎？

MIU說希望日本飯贏是事實。但是如果看前後發生的事情經過，其實在此之前MIU也有因為韓國飯大幅度增加而驚訝，並做過國藉調查投票。那時候投票裡韓國人比日本人更多，所以MIU才會在直播中說出「上次韓國粉絲贏了，今天日本粉絲能贏一次就好了」的言論。

還有以日文說了一遍「1號日本人，2號韓國人，3號其他」，以韓文再說了一遍「1號日本人，2號韓國人，3號其他」。如果說MIU是差別對待韓國飯的話，相信她也不會一字一板以韓文再說一次。

國藉調查投票是8月9日的SR，在31分20秒～34分35秒裡可以看到，順帶一提SR是一個日本互聯網平台，主要為日本人而運營。

希望大家明白為什麽想日本人也變得更多的理由和事情的來龍去脈。

此次sr事件就像在演唱會上 韓飯代表一層 日飯代表2層 讓大家尖叫的時候2層的聲音小了一點比較可惜而已。

（安利博中字產出中）

在國藉調查投票的時候也經常用韓文說話，直到這直播結束的時候也用韓文說了再見。以下是MIU在當天放送裡的韓文合集視頻

並且此次直播中不僅全程穿插韓語還用中文等其他外語向粉絲表示感謝，希望大家理智對待。

（https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_ZfDr2gF2Ko）

**另外在國藉調查投票裡有一部分粉絲以日本人作投票的事情，已經因此輕率的舉動而道歉。

2. 伊藤博文相關言論／戰犯歷史博物館宣傳大使爭議

‘下尾MIU‘練習生從來沒有表態過政治立場，但是有人因以下事情認為下尾MIU是右翼人士。

1- 尊敬’伊藤博文‘？

在自己故鄉山口縣的推廣視頻裡提及過伊藤博文，但是說尊敬伊藤博文的這件事是造謠。

原話是「山口縣里有很多像伊藤博文一樣，與歷史相當有關係的人物」。

在視頻裡可以確認到。

（https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fRFyDKlBEPM）

然後以下視頻裡面，說了山口縣的代表人物有伊藤博文和吉田松陰，再之後才說了尊敬金子 みすゞ（日本的童謠詩人）

（https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oga1h7UxT10）

2- MIU是祭奠A級戰犯的歷史博物館的宣傳大使？

MIU錄節目的地方是山口縣里有伊藤博文塊匾的一個叫’菜香亭’的地方。

這個地方是一個直至1996年為止營業了約120年的高級料理酒店，在2004年在山口縣里重建後，以低廉的價格租出給市民們進行文化活動和村內活動，並因此重新開放。只是店裡有塊匾丶以及展示了一些在塊匾上有名字的人物們的收藏品，這個地方絕對不是歷史博物館，MIU更加不是宣傳大使。

另外，這個地方是山口縣里的觀光景點，可以進行和服體驗等活動，也是韓國人旅遊經常會去的地方。

當時的節目是山口縣的地區放送，是為了明治150週年紀念而製作的放送，內容主要參觀山口縣主要的有名地方。這個節目除了MIU也任用了其他山口縣出身的偶像作為節目的輔助記者，而’菜香亭’是節目中其中一個參觀場所。

3. MIU看了伊藤博文的塊匾後說「厲害」了嗎？

MIU看了伊藤博文的塊匾後說「厲害」的事是造謠。當時的視頻裡看10分16秒的話，可以看到這句厲害是由男搞笑藝人說出的。

（https://www.bilibili.com/video/av18409803）

這視頻裡由10分10秒開始在討論有關伊藤博文的塊匾，MIU沒有作出任何發言。

這節目的另一條視頻（https://www.bilibili.com/video/av17915295）也再次提及過伊藤博文。

在5分30秒，在井上馨的墓前進行了’長州五傑’的說明，也再次提到了作為長州五傑里其中一人的伊藤博文。以及在之後一直進行長州五傑的說明里，MIU也沒有作出任何發言。

因為每個人的思路不同，因此根據事實基礎希望大家自行判斷，感謝大家看完這麼長的文章。​​​​
